subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! I began by reading your excellent historical treatise, for until now there had been neither time nor opportunity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان کتاب مستطاب تاریخ شما را ابتدا بقرائت نمودم زیرا تا بحال ابدا وقت و فرصت
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
